body:
In my response to Biden's Address to Congress, I spoke about how I've become accustomed to casual racism from the Left. I've been called every name unU.S. Senate 2022

| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9fa5553b94b6432a82e1cc269695859c&_e=RF32ZNDLFiWQhxDenquPsRd7qQwC4fsYLcO_CB3CiuSYOIrId_4stJEnqEftAYfhfXZYBndn2Eklp87GNdU0TmgrVMGBEiXqEjq0lALxLIKImh1r-Eb14HNx5-VKj7A0zOWfi8WE1MLXamMX4VdteRWPygPuF9xDrR7f5MKviAgcipS6AhOV1HRpiF3EkVqhSXZQ7FAgkaofDQmzKx_12h_cEN_p-0UzPwXYkSWG92yvBzwkiP8TWGGogMWxVksqJZcWRiJXabJ5azWnI5yqNKr2LbDO8mYtdU5eNULDToE2ZT6qp1usy5QlKsnEC8bMPsLgId7pRB0VZR70sKwWYSm86OY7trcAS_j_82dPZ2Z4ehBXyBj6RhpVt3TXOHOKLyRYfUwVEL6U3_RT7HNMhu9T8bxECoTs5OE2A2CGyfGXVccNLXpGxo8_Fujy1QLQQH4wiLXnGKEVo4sIcMKdDkto1oK5xeeQKBCUavRvxugd_7vDMzaznuhJs0iOUdsn)

Friend,

My name is Jim Lamon, and I’m officially **announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate** in the great state of Arizona.

As an Army veteran and businessman, I have a proven track record of success, and I want to take my real world experience to D.C. All too often, politicians go to Washington without your best interests in mind. **_They enrich themselves, they are beholden to special interests, and they fail to deliver results for the American people._**
**It’s time to end ‘BUSINESS AS USUAL’ in Washington.** [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9fa5553b94b6432a82e1cc269695859c&_e=RF32ZNDLFiWQhxDenquPsRd7qQwC4fsYLcO_CB3CiuSYOIrId_4stJEnqEftAYfhfXZYBndn2Eklp87GNdU0TmgrVMGBEiXqEjq0lALxLIKImh1r-Eb14HNx5-VKj7A0zOWfi8WE1MLXamMX4VdteRWPygPuF9xDrR7f5MKviAgcipS6AhOV1HRpiF3EkVqhSXZQ7FAgkaofDQmzKx_12h_cEN_p-0UzPwXYkSWG92yvBzwkiP8TWGGogMWxVksqJZcWRiJXabJ5azWnI5yqNKNFu7Z6rrca1pkSaetaJyefJKAbnKcdxZnGUy2iMa_z8a4c03n5R68Wf_LIfcwv_r05QBqaQGfP2tSOfYbRyhoXfro1UWUob97LO2LOFbTHmwPqNUugTzREPsTymPH5IXltJNxMgo0HIij8LZU-QeE29jYtFWYc_NF-kKoRLbRuIuF73KDzszn4LlGwiR_fOuhD8z8QFTY_PkVWXLq7oA5lAAWPNaJWNhod_PWfkjc7e8H_S1Q0YkKDhh41f5PnXA%3D%3D)

We need leaders who will stand up for the American people and fight back against adversaries like China. We need legislators who put America first and fix our broken immigration system. **We need to take money and power away from Washington and give it back to you.**

I am not the candidate of special interests, and definitely not the favorite of Communist China. As your Senator, I will answer only to you, the people of Arizona. I will put taxpayers first while supporting balanced budgets and spending reforms. I will fight corruption and push for term limits in Congress. I will defend your Constitutional rights and stand up to the Radical Left.

Together, we will take back the Senate Majority and bring Joe Biden’s Socialist agenda to a screeching halt.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action Items This Week: Fight Critical Race Theory & More…
body:
| |
---
Last week, Joe Biden gave an incredibly divisive speech and promised to spend a whole lot of your money. He mentioned a lot of awful ideas, but one thing he never mentioned was the crisis at the border. Interesting. We have interspersed our thoughts on this speech throughout other action items you can take this week.

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Leave a Comment Against the 1619 Project in Schools**
On Thursday, Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell, along with 38 fellow Republican senators, sent a letter to Secretary of Education Miguel Cardona urging him to withdraw The New York Times’ “1619 Project” from federal education grant programs.

“We write to express grave concern with the Department’s effort to reorient the bipartisan American History and Civics Education programs, including the Presidential and Congressional Academies for American History and Civics and the National Activities programs, away from their intended purposes toward a politicized and divisive agenda,” said the letter. “Actual, trained, credentialed historians with diverse political views have debunked the project’s many factual and historical errors, such as the bizarre and inaccurate notion that preserving slavery was a primary driver of the American Revolution,” the letter continued. “We request that you withdraw these Proposed Priorities and refocus on civic education and American history programs that will empower future generations of citizens to continue making our nation the greatest force for good in human history,” the letter concluded.

[Read the whole letter.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTI0LTgwZTkxYzhmNzk1ODQyZDM5MDIzZDU0MWMyZGY3MDY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVwdWJsaWNhbmxlYWRlci5zZW5hdGUuZ292L2ltby9tZWRpYS9kb2MvRklOQUwlMjBET0UlMjBDaXZpY3MlMjBFZHVjYXRpb24lMjBTaWduZWQlMjA0LjI5LjIxLnBkZj9taWQ9NDM3MzUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=QPGdJUeDeSu_OZz3xRI9iw)

**The Department of Education is accepting comments from the public on their Proposed Priorities until May 19.[Please visit this page to leave your comment.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTI0LTgwZTkxYzhmNzk1ODQyZDM5MDIzZDU0MWMyZGY3MDY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmVkZXJhbHJlZ2lzdGVyLmdvdi9kb2N1bWVudHMvMjAyMS8wNC8xOS8yMDIxLTA4MDY4L3Byb3Bvc2VkLXByaW9yaXRpZXMtYW1lcmljYW4taGlzdG9yeS1hbmQtY2l2aWNzLWVkdWNhdGlvbj9taWQ9NDM3MzUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=WKjePLw-dpJR8Rlq3vm6cQ)** When you are on the page, click on the green button in the upper right that says, “Submit a formal comment.”

**DEADLINE to comment is May 19th.**

You can use points made in the GOP letter to craft your comment. It can even be as simple as, “The 1619 Project is racist and has been debunked by actual historians of all political persuasions and it has no business being taught in any American school.”
|
---
In case you missed it (and let us assure you, you didn’t miss much) Joe Biden addressed a joint session of Congress last Wednesday.

In State of the Union style, Biden addressed a half-empty chamber on his various agenda items and was greeted with ovations from his party and silence from the opposing party — but, unlike a typical State of the Union, he spent very little time addressing the first 100 days of his presidency.

Why? Because, in doing so, he would’ve had to give former President Trump credit for the tremendous, continued successes of his administration even after he left office.

So, instead, Biden focused on promoting his radical economic agenda, which if enacted in its entirety, would result in nearly $10 trillion spent. That absurd number is roughly HALF of total U.S. GDP and 1/3 of the narrow money supply on planet earth.
|
---
**Call Your Senators**
When you call your Senators, you can leave more than one message during that call and save yourself the time of calling again! Please call both of your Senators, even if they are Democrats, and tell them the following:
* **Protect the filibuster** – vote no on any attempts to get rid of it.
* **No amnesty at all, in any way.**
* **You want border security** – and ask them what is being done to prevent human trafficking, especially child trafficking since there is a reward for getting children into the US.
* **They must oppose S.1** , what we call The Corrupt Politicians Act, and keep election regulation at the state, where they belong.

**Call Your Representative**
Make just one more call this week, this one to your Representative, and repeat that message about border security, and what their plans are to prevent human trafficking, and particularly child trafficking.
[FIND MY MEMBERS OF CONGRESS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTI0LTgwZTkxYzhmNzk1ODQyZDM5MDIzZDU0MWMyZGY3MDY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9teS50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9jb250YWN0LWNvbmdyZXNzLz9taWQ9NDM3MzUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=U6a2i_ta6emYdw8p4AA7ow)
|
---
While there were many disastrous visions, plans and policies discussed we want to focus on two in particular and highlight one subject that was notably absent from Biden’s speech: raising the minimum wage, gun control and the Biden Border Crisis.

One of the main economic agenda items Biden pushed was raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour. Despite already increasing the speed and rate of inflation with reckless government spending, Biden wants our nation to double down by increasing the minimum wage. This would, undoubtedly, weaken the value of the dollar even further and drive inflation at rate which we have not seen in our lifetime. It is a disastrous idea that threatens our economic recovery and struggling American workers, but nevertheless Biden persisted in his bull-headed ignorance.
|
---
**Read our Amicus Brief Filed in Georgia Election Case**
You told us you wanted more work done on Election Integrity, and I want to show you the latest action we’ve undertaken on that issue.

On Monday, Tea Party Patriots Foundation filed [an amicus curiae brief](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTI0LTgwZTkxYzhmNzk1ODQyZDM5MDIzZDU0MWMyZGY3MDY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcHJpbnQvYW1pY3VzLWJyaWVmLWZpbGVkLWluLWdlb3JnaWEtZWxlY3Rpb24tY2FzZS8_bWlkPTQzNzM1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=TmB8DvuyyyZJAvioZ6A6pA) to support a motion to unseal paper ballots and compel the production of actual ballots in Fulton County, GA.

**[You can read our statement about it](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTI0LTgwZTkxYzhmNzk1ODQyZDM5MDIzZDU0MWMyZGY3MDY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZS90ZWEtcGFydHktcGF0cmlvdHMtZm91bmRhdGlvbi1maWxlcy1hbWljdXMtY3VyaWFlLWJyaWVmLWluLWdhLWZvci0yMDIwLWVsZWN0aW9uLz9taWQ9NDM3MzUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=bgrG2JwCzQoLxHHJdTnrtg) on our website as well.**

Thank you for all you do to help make sure our elections have integrity, and are free and fair.
|
---
As if that wasn’t radical enough, the new progressive puppet President took it a step further by openly calling for gun control and confiscation of various firearms. While trying to sell it as “common-sense,” the proposal was anything but... Common-sense tells us that, if enacted, Biden's plan would just begin the slippery slope toward the complete erosion of our Second Amendment rights and the confiscation of all our firearms.

But, there was one item that was notably absent from Biden’s speech: the Biden Border Crisis.

Despite droning on for over an hour, Biden did not lay out a plan to address the crisis at our Southern Border. That is inexcusable.

The crisis at our southern border is reaching unprecedented levels, with over 2 million migrants expected to arrive at our border this year alone. It is without a doubt a national emergency, that has all but defined the Biden Administration’s first 100 days in office, yet he could not bring himself to address it?

We can decisively say that the first 100 days of the Biden administration has been a disaster for America, and where he wants to take America in the next 100 days is no better.
|
---
**Thank these Heroes**
Every year 150,000 high school seniors graduate and join the military. They are our unsung heroes so worthy of the support of every single American.

**Please take a moment to[visit the website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTI0LTgwZTkxYzhmNzk1ODQyZDM5MDIzZDU0MWMyZGY3MDY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cub3VyY29tbXVuaXR5c2FsdXRlcy5vcmcvP21pZD00MzczNSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=7Yr3LZgOaV7zEcBO8A8ajg) and sign the virtual “thank you” card. **
|
---

We are asking for prayers for a great liberty warrior, Kathryn Serkes. Kathryn helped us immensely with our documentary about Obamacare, The Determinators. She was instrumental in educating and activating Americans in the fight against Obamacare. Kathryn is now in the fight against that awful enemy, cancer. She has been on 4 different types of chemo for 43 weeks, and is now going to try 2 new ones.

We want to lift her up in prayer, so please join us as we pray for her and sign a letter we will be sending to her. **You can also leave your own message of hope and prayer for her[when you fill out this form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTI0LTgwZTkxYzhmNzk1ODQyZDM5MDIzZDU0MWMyZGY3MDY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvcHJheWVycy1mb3Ita2F0aHJ5bi1zZXJrZXMvP21pZD00MzczNSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=CLGN2ILwFnMjNIiB1RcVVg).** Thank you!
|
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTI0LTgwZTkxYzhmNzk1ODQyZDM5MDIzZDU0MWMyZGY3MDY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlP21pZD00MzczNSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=vVgWQiNvqPvyRO-zWYYFUg)
|
---

Virginia is _not_ a blue state, and we should be worried about Republicans winning this November.

That’s not just me saying it -- that’s coming from everyone from legendary Virginia expert Larry Sabato to political analysts at Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight.

History says Republicans are favored to win. If we sit back, self-proclaimed “Trump in heels” Amanda Chase will be the next Governor of Virginia.

That means we can’t be complacent, Derek.

**[Will you pitch in $15 today to help us defeat the extremist Republicans threatening to win the governor’s office?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28645691/283879090/-2023814932?refcode=20210504_TM_5F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTIyYTk0OS1lNmFjLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xd8wzLiGjo2EchxFETP-bHM1HBNAtVGSIszgbd-bQKo=)**

the Democrats, the Fake News Media, and Big Tech can do about it.

How to fight for the American people. How to
fight for the American dream. How to fight for the American
family and the American worker.

He taught us how to put America First.
CHIP IN $25 OR MORE TO THE AMERICA FIRST
RALLY FUND

Building the wall, protecting the unborn,
defending gun rights, promoting American businesses and bringing
jobs back, opposing endless war, and stopping our enemies like
China.

That is the America First agenda.

And to keep America First alive and well, I'm
teaming up with Matt Gaetz and this Friday, May 7th, to hold an

These rallies will give the MAGA base the

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: Heads up, PA voters: There’s an election on May 18!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey friends, it’s almost time to vote!
Pennsylvania’s upcoming Municipal Primary Election is on May 18, 2021 — that’s just two weeks from today.
Government should work for working people, and this is our chance to make our voices heard!
If you plan to vote by mail in this year’s judicial and municipal elections, the deadline to request your absentee ballot or mail-in ballot is soon, so make sure you apply _ASAP._
**No matter your party registration — Democrat, Republican, Green, or Independent — you can vote in this year’s primary because there are some big constitutional amendments on the ballot.**
Even if you voted by mail last year, or signed up for the permanent list, you need to re-apply if you plan to do so again in this year’s elections.
**Click below to request your absentee or mail-in ballot or to find out more information about this year’s elections:**
**[REQUEST YOUR BALLOT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28648820/283892778/-1813083118?refcode=em210504-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmYyYjBmMC1lZmFjLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SPxJCoWNYz5q-oYoLQ-Z2JWG324XtdIl21BTrav2xKI=&emci=5260ad8c-eeac-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=b6f2b0f0-efac-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=18034979#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin)**
**[FIND OUT MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28648821/283892779/-632889444?refcode=em210504-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmYyYjBmMC1lZmFjLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SPxJCoWNYz5q-oYoLQ-Z2JWG324XtdIl21BTrav2xKI=&emci=5260ad8c-eeac-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=b6f2b0f0-efac-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=18034979)**
If you’ve already requested your ballot, *high-five* — thanks for being a voter! Your ballot will be on its way any second now.
Our movement isn’t just about bringing change to the Senate. We need leaders who will listen to working people in every part of our government, from the US Senate to your local school board.
That’s why it’s important for all of us to get out and vote on May 18 — and tell your friends!
Thanks,
Team Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC

Philadelphia, PA 19110

subject: This should be their #1 priority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
| | Friend,

I strongly believe that securing the border and protecting the safety of the American people should be the #1 priority of the President of the United States.

Unfortunately, President Joe Biden has proven over the last three months that securing the border is at the bottom of his list of priorities.

**Thanks to the President, we 're now facing a FULL-BLOWN crisis on our southern border.**

Friend, this crisis is only getting worse and worse, which is why I want to know ASAP what YOU think of President Biden.

name: Special Election Update (Ellzey HQ)
subject: Can’t believe it's come to this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
We are running out of gas for our campaign
***** SPECIAL ELECTION RUN-OFF UPDATE *****
We can't sugarcoat this -- our team is scared.
The MUST WIN Texas Special Election Run-off is almost here and we are running out of gas for our campaign.
Biden, Pelosi, and the left-wing media are watching this race and if we fall further behind, there might not be a chance to catch up.
**This is our chance to embarrass Pelosi and Biden and all the obnoxious left-wing talking heads and big-mouths.**
We've seen what Democrat control of Washington looks like...
* _Lawlessness and crisis at the Southern border_
* _Trillions and trillions in new spending on failed big-government programs_
* _Anti-gun efforts to strip law-abiding gun owners of their Second Amendment rights_
* _The canceling of any conservative thoughts or ideas_

[**That 's why we NEED you to step up and chip in just $7 to help our conservative candidate, Ret. | | Peter, We talk about solving problems; some are harder than others. This one isn't childhood poverty, a Green energy economy or Medicare for All. But that doesn't make it easier for these politicians. It takes a real _politician_ to say that people living in Washington DC don't deserve equal representation. But that's exactly what we're hearing from Republicans like Pat Toomey, who are turning the basic tenets of our democracy into a political sideshow, Even some Democrats **coughJoeManchin** forget the fundamental democratic rights of DC residents. name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Join us tomorrow at 7pm ET / 4pm PT for a Cinco de Mayo event honoring mothers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Hi:

As Mother’s Day approaches, we give special thanks to the moms who have borne the brunt of the COVID pandemic: caregiving, distance learning, frontline serving, and in far too many cases, income losing. Sadly, over 2.3 million women, including almost 1 million moms, were forced to leave the workforce entirely. Latinas, in particular, were severely impacted.

It didn’t have to be this way — and thanks to your work electing a Democratic House, Senate, and White House, Help Is Here.

Because of you, our country is back on track from the deadly pandemic after Democrats delivered desperately-needed COVID relief and put millions of shots in arms, dollars in pockets, children safely back in school, and workers back on the job. We cut child poverty in half and are poised to do more to lift women out of poverty and help struggling families.

To underscore our progress and the more work that is needed to be done, join me and some very special guests for a Cinco de Mayo event honoring mothers everywhere. The event will take place virtually tomorrow, May 5 at 7:00pm ET / 4:00pm PT.

You can register here: https://bit.ly/May5Mom

We can’t let up,

Nancy

Nancy
Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.

As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.

We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.

Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25]

SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]

Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/69bf5707-ecac-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef/e8260a27-03ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODI2MGEyNy0wM2FkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M4tts5dlvDRxYc9aak1PKwmKu_3qC-UHLGQSPpZQ96c=&id=117907000 .
Nancy Pelosi for Congress
700 13TH STREET NW
Suite 800
Washington, DC 20005
United States
Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

name: John Burke
subject: 76,000 inmates to be released starting Saturday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
This is a blatant assault on public safety in California. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/e113ef2b0ca2cc09/ad1f766ef1d058a2c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, Starting this Saturday, Gavin Newsom is allowing 76,000 inmates to be released back into California — including many who have committed violent crimes! This is a blatant assault on public safety in the Golden State, and Kevin Faulconer is deeply worried as a citizen and especially as a father. Our children won't be safe riding their bikes in their own neighborhoods, our homes won't be safe from burglary, and murderers will be free to roam our streets.
**Is this what Gavin Newsom calls leadership? It’s what we call dangerous and reckless decision-making, and it’s putting all law-abiding Californians at risk. We owe it to our families to change course now!**
That’s why Kevin is leading the movement to recall Gavin Newsom this year in a special election. It is becoming increasingly important every single day that we get Gavin out of office, and get someone in who will actually put the safety of California families above partisan power plays.
Californians want an early release for Gavin Newsom, not violent criminals.
**Please help spread the word about Gavin Newsom’s latest attack on our safety by[sharing this article](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/e113ef2b0ca2cc09/c21ba48f2d0a7bb7c3d6b838967d376c/34943) about the planned inmate release:** [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/e113ef2b0ca2cc09/7d0867268281ed07c3d6b838967d376c/34943) This is NO way to run a state. **Californians want an early release for Gavin Newsom, not violent criminals.** It’s time for real leadership in California. It’s time to get Gavin Newsom OUT, and Kevin Faulconer IN!
Thanks for helping spread the word,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/e113ef2b0ca2cc09/d7ce32e1b9150a66c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/e113ef2b0ca2cc09/d2af10d4b9d95934c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/e113ef2b0ca2cc09/3788544a399f68aec3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/e113ef2b0ca2cc09/eb4ec77a3ba9b3ecc3d6b838967d376c/34943)

clean_body: This is a blatant assault on public safety in California. Read more >> Peter, Starting this Saturday, Gavin Newsom is allowing 76,000 inmates to be released back into California — including many who have committed violent crimes! This is a blatant assault on public safety in the Golden State, and Kevin Faulconer is deeply worried as a citizen and especially as a father. Our children won't be safe riding their bikes in their own neighborhoods, our homes won't be safe from burglary, and murderers will be free to roam our streets. Is this what Gavin Newsom calls leadership? It’s what we call dangerous and reckless decision-making, and it’s putting all law-abiding Californians at risk. We owe it to our families to change course now! That’s why Kevin is leading the movement to recall Gavin Newsom this year in a special election. It is becoming increasingly important every single day that we get Gavin out of office, and get someone in who will actually put the safety of California families above partisan power plays. Californians want an early release for Gavin Newsom, not violent criminals. Please help spread the word about Gavin Newsom’s latest attack on our safety by about the planned inmate release: This is NO way to run a state. Californians want an early release for Gavin Newsom, not violent criminals. It’s time for real leadership in California. It’s time to get Gavin Newsom OUT, and Kevin Faulconer IN! Thanks for helping spread the word, John Burke, Communications Director | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022

name: Jay Inslee
subject: I told you we had huge plans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We did it.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/_a-dsDv7zEsY/YktadDh5MVd6YUVYZW9pdVcwcW5KTjZiVGFHUE4rai9GS0RRcTVJZUtPcjRtOWFqK2tYOVpqOTlaTnpGODUrbkkybnI1cytQTWxsMUo3K3J1dkFQT2tPQkFnZkhDK3hGblJWdUVRMmIrQkU9S0/NVQ3Zm42WlRGR3c4Qmhlb2s2aGJrNGMzMk05NlI0RVUvSVJZTDF1YldBdz0S1) Friend, Heading into the legislative session, I told you we had huge plans. This was the year for a transformative session to combat the climate crisis, expand economic opportunity, and aggressively respond to the COVID-19 crisis in Washington state. Well, folks: We did all that and more. Together, we passed historic climate legislation. We began to fix our regressive tax system with a new capital gains tax and Working Families Tax Credit. We took critical steps to combat the pandemic and build back our economy with more equity. And we made tremendous progress on police reform, gun safety, and economic opportunity. We got so much done because the people of our state demanded action -- and the legislature listened. **[But there's still more work to do, and we can't do it alone. Will you donate today to keep Washington as a beacon of progress on climate, economic justice, and more?](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/d39jS0~qxLTd/YktadDh5MVd6YUVYZW9pdVcwcW5KTjZiVGFHUE4rai9GS0RRcTVJZUtPcjRtOWFqK2tYOVpqOTlaTnpGODUrbkkybnI1cytQTWxsMUo3K3J1dkFQT2tPQkFnZkhDK3hGblJWdUVRMmIrQkU9S0/NVQ3Zm42WlRGR3c4Qmhlb2s2aGJrNGMzMk05NlI0RVUvSVJZTDF1YldBdz0S1)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/2WP-M_w4ZNJY/YktadDh5MVd6YUVYZW9pdVcwcW5KTjZiVGFHUE4rai9GS0RRcTVJZUtPcjRtOWFqK2tYOVpqOTlaTnpGODUrbkkybnI1cytQTWxsMUo3K3J1dkFQT2tPQkFnZkhDK3hGblJWdUVRMmIrQkU9S0/NVQ3Zm42WlRGR3c4Qmhlb2s2aGJrNGMzMk05NlI0RVUvSVJZTDF1YldBdz0S1)

name: Team Scott
subject: The media's attacks on Tim Scott just got even more insulting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Don't want to receive anymore emails? [Unsubscribe](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9550376/224717773/2036/2/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk1NTAzNzY%3d&x=18d330a4)
****

This is nothing more than a shameful attempt by the mainstream media to cancel a popular Black voice in the Republican Party and silence conservatives who believe in the American Dream.

Friend,

_The Washington Post 's_ attempted "fact-check" of Senator Tim Scott's family history just got even more insulting.

[](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9550376/224717773/199499/3/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=cb0044c5)

The _Post_ tried to claim that Tim and his family had a privileged upbringing because some ancestors owned farmland well before he was born. That attack didn't work, so now they've resorted to claiming that Tim's story seems just _" a bit too tidy"_ to be true.

This is nothing more than a shameful attempt by the mainstream media to _**cancel**_ a popular Black voice in the Republican Party and silence conservatives who believe in the American Dream.
_****_
[Stand With Tim](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9550376/224717773/199499/4/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=de43c71d)
---

As Tim can tell you, there was nothing _" tidy"_ about his grandfather picking cotton as a boy during the Great Depression in the South. There was nothing _" tidy"_ about his grandfather leaving school to work in the fields at such a young age.

There was nothing _" tidy"_ about Tim's mother working 16 hours a day to keep food on the table for their family. There was nothing _" tidy"_ about her and her two boys sharing a bedroom after Tim's parents got divorced.

Despite those challenges, Tim recalls his childhood with a smile because of how much he overcame, not because of how easy he had it.
_****_
[Stand With Tim](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9550376/224717773/199499/5/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=fb4aa8f9)
---

But thanks to the grace of God and the encouragement of those who loved him, Tim Scott climbed the ladder to escape poverty and is now living his family's American Dream.

Since becoming the first African American elected to serve in both the House and Senate, he's worked hard to lower taxes, invest in struggling communities, and improve education so generations of kids like him can live their own American Dream.
_****_
[Stand With Tim](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9550376/224717773/199499/6/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=90a4facb)
---

It's telling that the story of a Black boy from North Charleston, South Carolina who grew up to be a business owner, Senator, and conservative leader is _" a bit too tidy"_ for some liberal journalists.

Tim Scott doesn't fit their stereotypes, and he doesn't fit their narrative. The media ignores minority conservatives like him and rejects the idea of the American Dream because it's politically inconvenient.

But Tim Scott is as authentic as they come and we're thankful for his strong conservative leadership.

[**Click here to help Tim Scott push back against the mainstream media 's ugly attacks and keep fighting for the American Dream.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9550376/224717773/199499/7/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=3ac5b9cb)

Team Scott
_****_
[Stand With Tim](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9550376/224717773/199499/8/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=b5597521)
---

PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---

1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407

************
****
****
****
****
****

This is nothing more than a shameful attempt by the mainstream media to cancel a popular Black voice in the Republican Party and silence conservatives who believe in the American Dream. As Tim can tell you, there was nothing " tidy" about his grandfather picking cotton as a boy during the Great Depression in the South. There was nothing " tidy" about his grandfather leaving school to work in the fields at such a young age. There was nothing " tidy" about Tim's mother working 16 hours a day to keep food on the table for their family. There was nothing " tidy" about her and her two boys sharing a bedroom after Tim's parents got divorced. Despite those challenges, Tim recalls his childhood with a smile because of how much he overcame, not because of how easy he had it. But thanks to the grace of God and the encouragement of those who loved him, Tim Scott climbed the ladder to escape poverty and is now living his family's American Dream. Since becoming the first African American elected to serve in both the House and Senate, he's worked hard to lower taxes, invest in struggling communities, and improve education so generations of kids like him can live their own American Dream. It's telling that the story of a Black boy from North Charleston, South Carolina who grew up to be a business owner, Senator, and conservative leader is " a bit too tidy" for some liberal journalists. Tim Scott doesn't fit their stereotypes, and he doesn't fit their narrative. The media ignores minority conservatives like him and rejects the idea of the American Dream because it's politically inconvenient. But Tim Scott is as authentic as they come and we're thankful for his strong conservative leadership. Team Scott PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 **

subject: Biden’s first 100 days: How did he do?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Bill Cassidy for US Senate
body:
Share your thoughts now
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gY6s0PnvzLKwE61iGzMRxFPbXQtEzRQ-zO1nCvo43GUqhsw6hHAEhFILDUGVRkEQRMORhpSCvYmPEuk5r39-MjGo3Zk_5MozNNvcW7YVaFdUWSDC9ja7UCj84v_5qN4dhXFkkqB4DfI0ri8tnJQOdgGUuNaRhkM8jW8c2FE5Spn4NftzFpsyPbVZGIF9JDUMtgvIJLKYpfpRGNoihWANjTqKrYTHyDLdavps5EyugVu7N_qmBFj_IHKo9SPTnK-DnZeQJkFeiczUt6zUxhOYHHVunFDXokl3uTqGEhKL4rMhONcMro4W3welPHTJ7eC3gRvgxj4nKOUDVhyGsE-J2eQ__jG9c7bEDycGFG_2xVPx3PAdDzRWeHftbaKUYmstZuh9xSUmeVSdzSxPpmfBLg==&c=aRxgu5EIpgBrYnPfO2kqxbfVfcpD6Wo5hmAzRYII4pxM5DH2WMUq8w==&ch=ItoW3xF_B7wjPcOkeS-fhu5cQ8IMNCWkM74mlv3iSsrhtIZB9xizmA==)

Friend,

Now that Joe Biden has officially crossed the 100-day mark of his presidency, we want to know what you think of his performance so far.

[**SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gY6s0PnvzLKwE61iGzMRxFPbXQtEzRQ-zO1nCvo43GUqhsw6hHAEhFILDUGVRkEQRMORhpSCvYmPEuk5r39-MjGo3Zk_5MozNNvcW7YVaFdUWSDC9ja7UCj84v_5qN4dhXFkkqB4DfI0ri8tnJQOdgGUuNaRhkM8jW8c2FE5Spn4NftzFpsyPbVZGIF9JDUMtgvIJLKYpfpRGNoihWANjTqKrYTHyDLdavps5EyugVu7N_qmBFj_IHKo9SPTnK-DnZeQJkFeiczUt6zUxhOYHHVunFDXokl3uTqGEhKL4rMhONcMro4W3welPHTJ7eC3gRvgxj4nKOUDVhyGsE-J2eQ__jG9c7bEDycGFG_2xVPx3PAdDzRWeHftbaKUYmstZuh9xSUmeVSdzSxPpmfBLg==&c=aRxgu5EIpgBrYnPfO2kqxbfVfcpD6Wo5hmAzRYII4pxM5DH2WMUq8w==&ch=ItoW3xF_B7wjPcOkeS-fhu5cQ8IMNCWkM74mlv3iSsrhtIZB9xizmA==)

From day one, Biden promised to unite the American people. Instead, we've seen Biden govern by executive order to appease the liberal, progressive wing of his party. name: Susan Wild
subject: Recognizing our teachers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
This week is National Teacher Appreciation Week and I wanted to take a moment to recognize the hard work of all of our incredible teachers.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28661899/283944432/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210504-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjJkMmQ1MC0xOGFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9Bpagg-EGKNI9pucArrrwddU8_C776LRs6NdcE3W5g=)
---
| Peter,

This week is National Teacher Appreciation Week and I wanted to take a moment to recognize the hard work of all of our incredible teachers.

This past year, teachers had to respond to sudden and unpredictable changes in education at all levels. They had to learn new technology and find ways to keep students engaged and learning virtually and through difficult circumstances.

Teachers deserve our gratitude year-round, but today I wanted to give them an extra special thank you.

When we support our teachers, we support our students and for the next generation. As a member of the House Committee of Education and Labor, I work every day on ways to support teachers and improve our education. That includes making sure public schools have the resources they need to support teachers.

I hope you will join me today in thanking our incredible teachers and showing your support for their hard work.

Sincerely,

Susan Wild
---

name: Chairman Stephen Stepanek
subject: Did you see my op-ed from this past weekend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
A letter from Chairman Stephen Stepanek

| | | | |
---
| | Derek,

The Biden administration has been a disaster, and the people of New Hampshire deserve better!
---

_"VICE PRESIDENT Kamala Harris recently celebrated her one-month anniversary of neglecting our southern border by touring northern New Hampshire — the first time she’s opted to enter our state since her failed presidential campaign in 2019. Reflecting back to her first visit to the Granite State, Harris was quick to vocalize her commitment to shutting down the “inhumane” treatment of border migrants. However, her promises have since proven to be empty — unlike the overcrowded migrant facilities, she’s still yet to visit." _
[_Check out the rest of my Op-Ed here _](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.unionleader.com%2Fopinion%2Fop-eds%2Fstephen-stepanek-we-deserve-strong-leadership-not-weak-deflection%2Farticle_c1781fa6-8aee-5080-9567-446e054eb10c.html/1/01000179383fd951-cc2d3165-200e-4e59-864c-7e340a991641-000000/INW9nAkdhOHSzPd6T74Bghog8fU=212)__

---
| While Democrats distract and deflect, we here at the New Hampshire Republican Party work every day to hold them accountable. But the truth is, that we cannot do it alone - [_we need your support now more than ever._](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdonate/1/01000179383fd951-cc2d3165-200e-4e59-864c-7e340a991641-000000/r_MvvXb0hWzIO_WqX_D5r2_88iM=212)

clean_body: A letter from Chairman Stephen Stepanek | | | | | | | Derek, The Biden administration has been a disaster, and the people of New Hampshire deserve better! "VICE PRESIDENT Kamala Harris recently celebrated her one-month anniversary of neglecting our southern border by touring northern New Hampshire — the first time she’s opted to enter our state since her failed presidential campaign in 2019. Reflecting back to her first visit to the Granite State, Harris was quick to vocalize her commitment to shutting down the “inhumane” treatment of border migrants. However, her promises have since proven to be empty — unlike the overcrowded migrant facilities, she’s still yet to visit." | While Democrats distract and deflect, we here at the New Hampshire Republican Party work every day to hold them accountable. But the truth is, that we cannot do it alone - Democrats refuse to take responsibility for their mistakes, it's up to us to call them out for it, but we can only do it with your help. Biden claimed that he would support unity and bipartisanship, but over the last 100 days, he’s done the opposite. He’s catering to his Far-Left base and liberal special interest donors while the rest of American gets left behind. He continues to ignore the southern border crisis that his radical open-border policies caused. name: Tom Cotton
subject: New Biden rule: no fines for illegal immigrants?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
%%First Name%%, First, Joe Biden created a border crisis by promising open borders, mass amnesty, and free healthcare to illegals.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T5QhNjSblVADkBPRUV4Qe5c0Xjg3JaG_TVoTYjjsqviAmAEPI16I8WG-7HH7vOFvaxWTETl_9BsWhBPMXucTusb-G1g-z2dMvqCaFI8jkUCUn9mWtOcmoaJ4R_r1c7Lal9kTcqg70UeR6YYoOQHKB5bjDpbngvFhDC95breh3L8-XaN6RyQNWofzznhkuaUGXDmrOGGDDNPAya7vk4ayMGkUep4YHJm2YND44YnRMjEl88H-337Y1jhkpzGP7bo2ZzRxzZbBa6tuIkbp1jssylhoeyirY5Yz5AkXraIuPRUiFkI3hA6LZM0YBnymLVwzt1HTOGEf7_4ADSfyTtXIcLQI7Mjxj2wkBrqkVF8iDJCzRvgdAi2jlPDd1pgzvR16PiWb77oxuU2mQqSRS2lSq6rQQkGo6lefmWqGayq0IZvVX0MeKcPuXg==&c=hLCDf1zavyTmmqAuOMnzfM9YAy1uDV6D2vOyFCubsmTCAQSesu-mAw==&ch=vdW9ldUgFURNZueYqslUJWbAKUCUUJYumgxe8cj6nqlUbrXvZtRcHw==)
Friend,

**First,** Joe Biden created a border crisis by promising open borders, mass amnesty, and free healthcare to illegal immigrants.

**Then,** the Biden administration started trying to ban the term "illegal alien."

**Now,** they've scrapped fines for illegal immigrants who refuse to leave America.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T5QhNjSblVADkBPRUV4Qe5c0Xjg3JaG_TVoTYjjsqviAmAEPI16I8WG-7HH7vOFvaxWTETl_9BsWhBPMXucTusb-G1g-z2dMvqCaFI8jkUCUn9mWtOcmoaJ4R_r1c7Lal9kTcqg70UeR6YYoOQHKB5bjDpbngvFhDC95breh3L8-XaN6RyQNWofzznhkuaUGXDmrOGGDDNPAya7vk4ayMGkUep4YHJm2YND44YnRMjEl88H-337Y1jhkpzGP7bo2ZzRxzZbBa6tuIkbp1jssylhoeyirY5Yz5AkXraIuPRUiFkI3hA6LZM0YBnymLVwzt1HTOGEf7_4ADSfyTtXIcLQI7Mjxj2wkBrqkVF8iDJCzRvgdAi2jlPDd1pgzvR16PiWb77oxuU2mQqSRS2lSq6rQQkGo6lefmWqGayq0IZvVX0MeKcPuXg==&c=hLCDf1zavyTmmqAuOMnzfM9YAy1uDV6D2vOyFCubsmTCAQSesu-mAw==&ch=vdW9ldUgFURNZueYqslUJWbAKUCUUJYumgxe8cj6nqlUbrXvZtRcHw==)
Friend, this is insane, and it's making America the laughing stock of the world. Joe Biden and the Democrats have had power for three months, and they've put illegal immigrants first and Americans last every step of the way.

**The reason is simple: Joe Biden and the Democrats don 't believe in borders. They want to decriminalize illegal immigration. And they want to totally dismantle the rule of law in America. **

I will **NEVER** bend a knee to this politically correct insanity -- [**and I 'm asking you to stand with me. name: Harold
subject: 5/10 isn’t good enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Earls for Georgia |
body:
Our education system should be focused on setting our kids up for success, NOT appeasing teachers unions or the woke liberal mob. | |
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=48d017f2cf884502967666921cf618da&_e=nWoKJIplARGBz2cljmSZIwlrdnFjRkt3zoch2UY1d5oYeQPZrAEIHRvD7-doCB3UPbAIRoUXcpNWU3UVPOudX0kQjDHAGxFuBJN4zcB6beKmR992WHkpY4NRagXstoHFfpkVlGCq7Tn4rKlZpBBcQp5GK7Pp940LmDOuvCsvFG6KvJOPTgzNtJoB3C9kKCV3aIiFTMZ48dILDMc0HsoBz27MY7POin5fSK-Wj3N9AkHcWPKzwjyckQ3gcZTL4m9N0jtTYFbPkjMZ7-GJUCYTSJoRH-IIVMLN-YvuAcTYJGdy4d1QEDVooVgOwURztHDjkOe-cUA6DH0K-lna5hX6JdKOSJxax0W_XQ_TTglDmKRh1HAxnxKLCbljC6Uf-MZ0lwNyBOiUyK3XEQeTgj4OF9BlZaE726wX57QS67_3jVM2-Mdah9TJ45QCTdzomC4pKNtm42TP9iFu3NR68wPBmguoIniWy_Y_EBsqhvVmU3Kjnxkyp8f_aHkU-dNAeS7x05ZauqmCDltuWDquOxZ_gA%3D%3D)
|
---
Peter,

As a parent, I want my boys to have every opportunity to succeed, and sometimes that means sending them to a school that isn’t right down the road.

**That’s why I’ve made School Choice one of the top priorities of my campaign - because every child deserves a quality education.**

If you agree, will you sign my petition now to demand School Choice for America’s children?
|
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=48d017f2cf884502967666921cf618da&_e=nWoKJIplARGBz2cljmSZIwlrdnFjRkt3zoch2UY1d5oYeQPZrAEIHRvD7-doCB3UPbAIRoUXcpNWU3UVPOudX0kQjDHAGxFuBJN4zcB6beKmR992WHkpY4NRagXstoHFfpkVlGCq7Tn4rKlZpBBcQp5GK7Pp940LmDOuvCsvFG6KvJOPTgzNtJoB3C9kKCV3aIiFTMZ48dILDMc0HsoBz27MY7POin5fSK-Wj3N9AkHcWPKzwjyckQ3gcZTL4m9N0jtTYFbPkjMZ7-GJUCYTSJoRH-IIVMLN-YvuAcTYJGdy4d1QEDVooVgOwURztHDjjQSX27qbkOzgvVlVS0r21-YUlJ-3rfU1pavuuBGMqrZomxj91wXoBcRq_MjlWmPZpHsW65aVtkYXFlfwoRgESYfJwJY1YV0oxX2XhSEW4lGLFnVJJbuNdXd8EJPNaBe2NFyPMZKJVT_r-l8wKglGnJ_O9ro3oZmdGR_nMC89GLFkr7p_1jjQddsgMs9rGSegd213WJa_v11IWK5sU_rEgQ%3D%3D)
|
---
Peter, this issue is very close to mine and Rachel’s hearts because, like you, we care deeply about our two (and in a couple more weeks, three!) boys.

We are fortunate to live near a great elementary school. It’s rated 9/10 - near perfect! But we are slated for a middle school that’s a dismal 5/10...

**Our children are America’s future, and they deserve better than failing schools.**

But instead of allowing parents to decide where our children would thrive and learn best, the government decides where we can send our kids to school based on our zip code.

This makes no sense, and it leaves parents with no choice but to move or make the costly decision to enroll our children in a private school just for the chance to provide a decent education. **If we have to pursue an education option outside of the public system, then we should be allowed to use our tax dollars to fund it.**

Our children are counting on us to do the right thing, and I won’t let them down.

_**[If you’re with me, click this link to add your name to my School Choice Petition right now.>>>](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=48d017f2cf884502967666921cf618da&_e=nWoKJIplARGBz2cljmSZIwlrdnFjRkt3zoch2UY1d5oYeQPZrAEIHRvD7-doCB3UPbAIRoUXcpNWU3UVPOudX0kQjDHAGxFuBJN4zcB6beKmR992WHkpY4NRagXstoHFfpkVlGCq7Tn4rKlZpBBcQp5GK7Pp940LmDOuvCsvFG6KvJOPTgzNtJoB3C9kKCV3aIiFTMZ48dILDMc0HsoBz27MY7POin5fSK-Wj3N9AkHcWPKzwjyckQ3gcZTL4m9N0jtTYFbPkjMZ7-GJUCYTSJoRH-IIVMLN-YvuAcTYJGdy4d1QEDVooVgOwURztHDjq41zah0pmw7Cq0r6JnY-HFFi-MH8uU1ibMdMHJwZzDqNkxslHPQJaCxSlmwPqVcbeSyWRMCMQkK4X0McHcR_gf20K5Rl8JbBHf7QkZW3s3iqTc9ijfB1ljQ0-f54uEDOG6x8JET5X6U-Owc5HJTQQXLxXvF44aKLUX9yoOzU3xheKXmOOF8MaDW27BvroVKN_HRC7YYWNqIF_N4AZG8jsA%3D%3D)**_
|

| [Unsubscribe](http://links.haroldearls.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_s=48d017f2cf884502967666921cf618da&_t=mCSgBz0WAzIrORq_PXNmfASNSpR-Bgdy9KNas1fuEwv3s2-mPZQpZa4xReoUXfyhiNE9mZax-oIenKIvKG6mLKQyHdICK2UNoIhTA7H3gD5_V5pDYruF51U-2nx8iC3XEmO5719Gq7PAB7OsECBey4bUSa8kkUQz_OKkxm5Al3U%3D) |
clean_body: Our education system should be focused on setting our kids up for success, NOT appeasing teachers unions or the woke liberal mob. | | | Peter, As a parent, I want my boys to have every opportunity to succeed, and sometimes that means sending them to a school that isn’t right down the road. That’s why I’ve made School Choice one of the top priorities of my campaign - because every child deserves a quality education. If you agree, will you sign my petition now to demand School Choice for America’s children? | | Peter, this issue is very close to mine and Rachel’s hearts because, like you, we care deeply about our two (and in a couple more weeks, three!) boys. We are fortunate to live near a great elementary school. It’s rated 9/10 - near perfect! But we are slated for a middle school that’s a dismal 5/10... Our children are America’s future, and they deserve better than failing schools. But instead of allowing parents to decide where our children would thrive and learn best, the government decides where we can send our kids to school based on our zip code. This makes no sense, and it leaves parents with no choice but to move or make the costly decision to enroll our children in a private school just for the chance to provide a decent education. If we have to pursue an education option outside of the public system, then we should be allowed to use our tax dollars to fund it. Our children are counting on us to do the right thing, and I won’t let them down. | | Thank you, Harold | | | Paid for by Earls for Georgia | | 824 S Milledge Ave Ste 101, Athens, GA 30605 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Laura Loomer
subject: We did it!
body:
First, thank you so much for helping out with this!
---
First, thank you so much for helping out with this!

| | | | Patriot,

[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/muGAycAqSsGBXs9Ir7mJMukXE8aj7XtitfXug_AiPGEhtma0pbz-SpbZ67UH-BtuAUj2qCyZ1wSXdMjLFQsXU00Pgd2GDUFIhZXD7NsCoGhJPP67Hji0bIbJ8v2F9CBAUE-cx13i9gSeqkgzUz4jOOYVcXI6onq3mmaLqeKwYK9HW92LNzHhAr1V32MA7Sv10Xpkc3jgxabtWMidNZhCQprl76jQDWxeCrBsKws_gJQwxysjzwvB-cpsX9ikuN5jbMmQJCRpzANsR2B5hgS2n0LdH-oa6hbt1Y6F_V9m6eFsKhWD) First, thank you so much for helping out with this!

**On Friday, Governor DeSantis signed the bill to enact a new law that will fine Big Tech for interfering in our elections!**

And one of the amendments we were pushing so hard for, made it to the final version of the bill!

**The maximum fine went from $100,000 a day to $250,000 per day!**

Now, our job gets real as we have to start working to roll this out in other states!

There are 32 states where we have a real shot at getting similar legislation passed.

Texas, Pennsylvania, North Carolina, Georgia, Arizona, Kansas and Missouri are all in the running on top of many more.

I’ll be on a full-blown legislative blitz around the country, but before I start, I have to refill our coffers just to be able to afford my travel expenses to continue my work across the country.

[**Can you pitch in to get the next state started?**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/XxiFhYxXXSeCsJJPomKCGC7yy0byzM0fmzac-pDDb0iio9wIj71dDLn_kp6iYmDGJUQJjSW_FtuX_LfTzIBaDmBS8l0MUqGqKLvj_2M5XO0gvJvAafjF1pzjAa5R1XBt1hvaHNPfQYoYv9APt0ty1FDG5ZBUeGQcM-GGJewziRBuEox5jWf1zZmre22_GM63smIyNEc077j1BbJGtvwpA23S-kY9sTa5y_lV7pdTr8IWqnxY-c9sR1H4QL9elEGt8z5_rC-8N_d0HRWeHicHXznLUw0AjLm8saFjuEeS9IuAmq8b)

My weekly travel expenses will be about $1,200 and to be able to move as fast as possible and hit the legislative windows, I have to get going.

**Texas’ legislative session ends this month and that’s the next big state we can hit.**

We’re 1-0 right now in our nation’s third most populous state. Let’s go for the second largest state and go bigger in Texas!

[**Donate whatever you can today**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/GpWzOJTklaEwqVe__dLFAcs_4rZZOD67e14mg88fUdSHJXn50EoROwH_LoYjQRD-ClhOxXSjXTZaXTob2WqzkVSObmR4dHf3RYd_WLfw_tHaW-lC5xpzrlzorBn41wnkH8DcJY06yp5jYndAaZIcjfoh4rPl-BBHB6J6X_FrzOP5Yk-qwd3MihRhwiDAOXM1DQWb6J_xyMBjvjoMmWhHELJ4fhZ6wDLuTcmhhQ7EgNL1U5td5iPVf9HChpWNsHUyzKqy2XgMM4a44EYCmno_r9Bx8BOebHgTRvDYGNjqapCY5yJg) and I’ll report back in a day or two with more information.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---

name: Tim Ryan
subject: This race could make or break our Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28664502/283952680/602283465?refcode=20210504_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmEzMTg1YS0yMmFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xJbBn9HgPdA271Q8toNcyS_0ez6A77RAXsrE7pVgS-Q=) Friends, I’m officially entering the race for Ohio’s battleground Senate seat. I’m about to ask you to [**split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton’s**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28664503/283952681/602283465?refcode=20210504_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmEzMTg1YS0yMmFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xJbBn9HgPdA271Q8toNcyS_0ez6A77RAXsrE7pVgS-Q=) , but first let’s talk about why I knew I had to run: Everyday folks used to have a promise they could count on. If you worked hard, you’d be able to keep a roof over your head, put food on the table, and provide a better future for your children and their children too. Well, American workers kept up their end of the bargain. They’ve been working longer and harder than ever before, but they just can’t get ahead. **Somewhere along the line, our country lost sight of how to make things work for everyone.** We ended up with an economy and a political system that only works for the wealthy few—while the working class folks who dug the deepest and sent our nation soaring were left behind. **It’s time to hit the reset button in Washington and cut workers in on the deal. I've been working hard with Seth Moulton to get it done in Congress—[ if you’re with us, will you split a donation between our campaigns?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28664504/283952682/602283465?refcode=20210504_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmEzMTg1YS0yMmFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xJbBn9HgPdA271Q8toNcyS_0ez6A77RAXsrE7pVgS-Q=)** [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28664505/283952683/-1665179247?refcode=20210504_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmEzMTg1YS0yMmFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xJbBn9HgPdA271Q8toNcyS_0ez6A77RAXsrE7pVgS-Q=)
I was born and raised in a blue collar union family in Northeast Ohio. I grew up hearing stories about how my grandfather would walk to the steel mill every day to look for work during the Depression, and I’ve watched my family members and neighbors have their jobs shipped overseas. I’ve seen firsthand how our communities have been left behind as the American Dream gets further and further out of reach. That’s why I’ve spent my career in Congress fighting to ensure that everyone can have a good-paying job, quality health care they can afford, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. I’m running to be Ohio’s next senator because I will fight like hell to cut workers in on the deal. **Change is coming -- and we’re gonna do it together.[ Split a donation of $5, $10, $15 $25—whatever you can—to help me and Seth Moulton ensure workers and families get the fair shot they deserve!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28664506/283952684/602283465?refcode=20210504_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmEzMTg1YS0yMmFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xJbBn9HgPdA271Q8toNcyS_0ez6A77RAXsrE7pVgS-Q=)** [I'm in!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28664507/283952685/-1665179247?refcode=20210504_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmEzMTg1YS0yMmFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xJbBn9HgPdA271Q8toNcyS_0ez6A77RAXsrE7pVgS-Q=)
I’m so proud to have you in my corner. Let’s do this, Tim Ryan [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28664508/283952687/-1665179247?refcode=20210504_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmEzMTg1YS0yMmFkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xJbBn9HgPdA271Q8toNcyS_0ez6A77RAXsrE7pVgS-Q=) clean_body: | | | = Friends, I’m officially entering the race for Ohio’s battleground Senate seat. I’m about to ask you to = , but first let’s talk about why I knew I had to run: Everyday folks used to have a promise they could count on. If you worked hard, you’d be able to keep a roof over your head, put food on the table, and provide a better future for your children and their children too. Well, American workers kept up their end of the bargain. They’ve been working longer and harder than ever before, but they just can’t get ahead. Somewhere along the line, our country lost sight of how to make things work for everyone. We ended up with an economy and a political system that only works for the wealthy few—while the working class folks who dug the deepest and sent our nation soaring were left behind. It’s time to hit the reset button in Washington and cut workers in on the deal. I've been working hard with Seth Moulton to get it done in Congress—= = I was born and raised in a blue collar union family in Northeast Ohio. I grew up hearing stories about how my grandfather would walk to the steel mill every day to look for work during the Depression, and I’ve watched my family members and neighbors have their jobs shipped overseas. I’ve seen firsthand how our communities have been left behind as the American Dream gets further and further out of reach. That’s why I’ve spent my career in Congress fighting to ensure that everyone can have a good-paying job, quality health care they can afford, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. I’m running to be Ohio’s next senator because I will fight like hell to cut workers in on the deal. Change is coming -- and we’re gonna do it together.= = I’m so proud to have you in my corner. Let’s do this, Tim Ryan = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. body:
We can't let the Socialists in Congress take away our right to bear arms.

Fellow Patriot,

We're sure you've heard by now that the Supreme Court is hearing a case on open carry in New York (where the Second Amendment is **wrongly** under attack!).

As proud conservative patriots, the Constitutional right to bear arms is one of our most important rights -- it's what protects our families, defends our homes, and **showcases the patriotic freedoms our country was founded under. **

The Radical Left's attempt to strip this right from us is wrong and we have to show them that. Which is why we wanted to make sure you saw our exclusive new merchandise item: _so you can wear your support for the Second Amendment all day everyday!_

| | In one week, Amanda Chase could officially be the Republican nominee in the Virginia Governor’s race.

Here’s why she could emerge victorious at this weekend’s Republican nominating convention:
* She’s the polling front-runner, leading her opponents by a huge margin.
* She is a grassroots donor darling when compared to her establishment Republican rivals.
* She calls herself “Trump in heels” and recently traveled to Mar-a-lago to lock up Donald Trump’s endorsement.

**[It’s bananas, but by this time next week Amanda Chase could be the Republican nominee for Governor. Will you contribute right now to help Terry stop her so we can keep Virginia’s progress moving forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28664839/283953968/-2023814932?refcode=20210504_GR_5H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGU2MDVjNy0yM2FkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RZM5uOjN1Su0Bb7PCXGUnF7YAUIPgHbug2v__ayZKVI=)**

Virginia’s made incredible progress, but we know it’s fragile. Everyone from 538 to election guru Larry Sabato has said a Democratic victory in 2021 is no slam dunk.

History says Democrats are the underdog, and with Amanda Chase on the precipice of winning the nomination, we have to unite behind Terry right now to keep the Commonwealth blue.

**[Will you pitch in $15 so we have the resources to run a winning campaign, no matter who the Republicans throw at us in 2021?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28664840/283953969/-2023814932?refcode=20210504_GR_5H&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGU2MDVjNy0yM2FkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RZM5uOjN1Su0Bb7PCXGUnF7YAUIPgHbug2v__ayZKVI=)**

Friend, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are **killing** oil and gas jobs in Oklahoma. In just the first week of his presidency, Biden signed **22 executive orders,** halting construction of the Keystone XL Pipeline, banning new energy exploration on federal land plus adding reams of red tape. But, despite the Biden-Harris Administration's damaging actions...Oklahoma is strong, tough, resilient, and ready for the opportunities and challenges ahead. _**Unlike the Democrats, we take a common-sense approach in Oklahoma.**_
* We've kept taxes low because we want more taxpayers, not higher tax rates.
* We're supporting our domestic energy industries because they're the heart of our state's economy.
* We're enacting **business-friendly policies** because it's NOT our job to slow business down; it's to create a climate that attracts new industries and new jobs with good pay.

I hate seeing what President Biden's executive orders are doing to our state and country. Here in Oklahoma, we're making the right calls and enacting the smart policies that will unlock our potential and unleash our economy. We're on the right track and heading in the right direction, Friend. clean_body: "Don't ever give up. Don't ever quit. The future doesn't just happen. You make it happen. So dream big!" == Friend, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are killing oil and gas jobs in Oklahoma. In just the first week of his presidency, Biden signed 22 executive orders, halting construction of the Keystone XL Pipeline, banning new energy exploration on federal land plus adding reams of red tape. But, despite the Biden-Harris Administration's damaging actions...Oklahoma is strong, tough, resilient, and ready for the opportunities and challenges ahead. Unlike the Democrats, we take a common-sense approach in Oklahoma. We've kept taxes low because we want more taxpayers, not higher tax rates. We're supporting our domestic energy industries because they're the heart of our state's economy. We're enacting business-friendly policies because it's NOT our job to slow business down; it's to create a climate that attracts new industries and new jobs with good pay. I hate seeing what President Biden's executive orders are doing to our state and country. Here in Oklahoma, we're making the right calls and enacting the smart policies that will unlock our potential and unleash our economy. We're on the right track and heading in the right direction, Friend. == == | | == == | | == == | == == | | == == | == == | | == == My Dad gave me a piece of advice I'll never forget. "Don't ever give up. Don't ever quit. The future doesn't just happen. You make it happen. So dream big!" That 's why I won't quit until we complete Oklahoma's turnaround and become a Top Ten state! I hope to have you on my team, Friend! All the best, Governor Kevin Stitt Get involved with Team Stitt Today! name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: Democrats tried to “cancel” me, now they’ll cancel you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
First the Democrats and Big Tech tried to "cancel" your favorite brands.

Then, Democrats tried to "cancel" me, my fellow Members of Congress and even President Trump.

Now, Democrats tried to "cancel" an entire state because it wouldn't bow to their whims.

**You and I both know, the only thing needing "canceling" is cancel culture.**
_****_
**[**" CANCEL" CANCEL CULTURE**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/josh-hawley/?sc=pem8812m13m&utm_campaign=20210504_TY-2.101720_senator-josh-hawley_t1061608-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210504_democrats-tried-to-cancel-me-now-theyll-cancel-you)**
---
_****_
President Trump is making his comeback with the launch of his own social media platform--**and he 's taking cancel culture head on.**

Patriot, we need your help to "cancel" cancel culture once and for all--because no one is safe.

Enjoy baseball? **CANCELED**

Enjoy election integrity? **CANCELED**

**President Trump and I are fighting back --but we need you with us. So, how about it? Will you stand with President Trump and I as we "cancel" cancel culture?**
_****_
**[**" CANCEL" CANCEL CULTURE**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/josh-hawley/?sc=pem8812m13m&utm_campaign=20210504_TY-2.101720_senator-josh-hawley_t1061608-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210504_democrats-tried-to-cancel-me-now-theyll-cancel-you)**
---
_****_
Thank you patriot,

Senator Josh Hawley

**

body:
That’s from a recent article talking about how big corporate PACs are lining up behind my opponent Rep. Liz Cheney -- who joined with Nancy Pelosi and Dear Fellow Conservative,

_**" As House Republican Conference Chair Liz Cheney (R-Wyo.) prepares for an intense primary election, business PACs are giving her an early fundraising boost.

"PACs associated with several major companies -- including Walmart, American Express, Morgan Stanley, T-Mobile, and Pfizer -- bankrolled Cheney's accounts last month. AT&T, one of the top annual PAC donors, gave $10,000 to Cheney's campaign."**_
That's from a recent article talking about how big corporate PACs are lining up behind my opponent Rep. Liz Cheney -- who joined with Nancy Pelosi and voted to IMPEACH President Trump.

In fact, according to official FEC reports, Liz Cheney is "the No. 2 recipient of donations from PACs associated with corporations and trade associations, trailing only Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer for the top spot among all members of Congress."
**" Corporate PACs bankroll Liz Cheney as Trump backs primary"**
"Woke" corporations are lining up behind Liz Cheney -- FLOODING her campaign coffers with MILLIONS of dollars.

Of course, these are the same "woke" corporations trying to shove the Democrats' far-left agenda down our throats.

The same "woke" corporations who are supporting boycotts of Georgia and Texas because Republicans are moving to secure elections by simply requiring voters to show an ID.

The same "woke" corporations who want open borders and amnesty for illegal immigrants.

And the same "woke" corporations who seemingly hate our traditional conservative values.

I don't know about you, but I don't want "woke" corporations like Google, Facebook, American Express, and Morgan Stanley deciding the future of our country.

My name is Anthony Bouchard. I'm a Wyoming State Senator, longtime conservative grassroots activist, small businessman, husband, father of four, and proud Republican who believes we'll never beat the Left by waving the white flag of surrender.

I'm running for the U.S. House in Wyoming against Rep. Liz Cheney -- a leading Never-Trumper who joined with Nancy Pelosi and voted to IMPEACH President Trump.

[**And today -- I 'm asking for your generous support to help me DEFEAT RINO Liz Cheney in 2022**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8ebdadfd59f147ec83b1fac31e75e834&_e=nCd3lhvZxYCKCUTl-Q6FavEjOC3jAImk0fa7tN6jPCJ4zalP_jyPJ7pml-5qVTeByeIImSdIH2a9TRgrlJktCRDWRP0VOGfGBscdDnDpQ0Tw9nICyE64otbHL1qHo3MmU5XbOniG3w4XI-FrFcaHOuwE5deZ_WK2Tc9xGuCYqfnT4xEovBEKEQPxRE63X9yx4-Qy6GXIs5DTbpl5n85wqYDAuiG40ejGNpT-4i3wdQIQMIiDGxeQMnJxgvOSGNcIOSDhlsQ5N0DR39MgWyvtQQHFF4al5OqrnVw7matn8uuSR-NL7-dpgnorexLYYotM2jaueEXFQ0_26JaeYpvdVFTe0UvG6BATvMHkZ8ePXUGI9GhG2DciCBSqVvObyEDMVQL4k2u7MaaLIKNO6cw9bWRzl6AvPL0Gz4NynZ6_R4xRRKVwAuygfrqm2No_Dj3g04MqJJYFyMTFi3yNcW4QAw%3D%3D)**.**

Of course, I'm not surprised "woke" corporations are backing Liz Cheney.

After all, Liz Cheney supports open borders and the America Last foreign policy Trump ended -- and Biden and the Democrats are bringing back.

She also stated, "I would not" when asked if she would vote for President Trump if he were the 2024 GOP nominee -- effectively admitting she prefers Joe Biden's socialist agenda over President Trump's America-First one.

She even dressed in Democrat blue and fist-bumped Joe Biden right before he rolled out his plan to bankrupt America morally and fiscally before a joint session of Congress.

But it's not just the powerful corporations lining up behind Liz Cheney.

U.S. Senator Mitt Romney's PAC maxed out to her.

News reports say that U.S. Senator Lisa Murkowski (R-AK) is planning on campaigning for Liz Cheney as is former U.S. Senator Jeff Flake (R-AZ).

Even Democrats are opening their wallets in support of Liz Cheney.

House Speaker Paul "RINO" Ryan hosted a virtual fundraiser for Liz Cheney last week -- with a "suggested contribution" of $2,900 to "attend" or $5,800 to be a "co-host" of the Ryan-Cheney event.

The media elites, the Democrats, the Never Trump establishment and deep-pocketed corporate PACs are all FLOODING Liz Cheney's campaign coffers with MILLIONS of dollars.

They agree with Liz Cheney when she says that Donald Trump **" doesn't have a role in the future of the GOP." \-- even though President Trump gained more votes than any Republican in history and made big gains in the African-American and Hispanic communities.**

And now the Washington, D.C. "Swamp" is planning to spend whatever it takes to help protect Liz Cheney from facing the wrath of angry voters at the ballot box in the 2022 Wyoming Republican Primary.

[**So won 't you please chip in a donation to let me know you've got my back against Liz Cheney and the Never Trump RINOs**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8ebdadfd59f147ec83b1fac31e75e834&_e=nCd3lhvZxYCKCUTl-Q6FavEjOC3jAImk0fa7tN6jPCJ4zalP_jyPJ7pml-5qVTeByeIImSdIH2a9TRgrlJktCRDWRP0VOGfGBscdDnDpQ0Tw9nICyE64otbHL1qHo3MmU5XbOniG3w4XI-FrFcaHOuwE5deZ_WK2Tc9xGuCYqfnT4xEovBEKEQPxRE63X9yx4-Qy6GXIs5DTbpl5n85wqYDAuiG40ejGNpT-4i3wdQIQMIiDGxeQMnJxgvOSGNcIdt0WRjfKczEp44iMyUMYUyyNvX-SlfbD_3KMBFpfcYLg7lV0hoJ0CEW05V2l492RNkx2jJMuLTNkm998EfPnSqScT5Ed19tV-6yLobCj5tkeqnbu5ZwwmVEdlWw6dGUA_OuuuCOJCrBp32LiPtEwzXJCNR1ZVdCOuiSaFZcQ7KaiFMnpBCF9XdaLeMZjXK-Dr1JmaWgwYEB_p4qnlZ2acA%3D%3D)**?**

Of course, I understand I can't compete with Liz Cheney's RINO-backed war chest dollar-for-dollar.

But that's OK.

I don't have to.

Wyoming voters are already OUTRAGED at Liz Cheney.

They've had enough of her conservative betrayals.

**And a recent Trump-backed poll shows I 'm outperforming Liz Cheney 54%-21%. With President Trump's voters, it's 61%-13%! **

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Fundamentalist Liberals Are Making COVID Worse
body:
As increasingly secular liberals find more and more meaning in politics, they are becoming increasingly fundamentalist. [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=e655b03e634b4125b3777500df51a28b&_e=c5ktM-mLo0SzAQaeLQLQSZ8DWqSZykgT398tIO1c98dB9aLnoZj7AQsZyXJR5yre0_6T32x6Hc-k5A6_YZAh5ZRtLYuhsdNlyOXYxKi00Fd4VUqx9-8Dn5i2fbAjC1VadPYJ320OefaFUH50VSpsICjSLts8X6hC7Xo_K_1fYMjpK4F9nIW0dQZoStD60VUY64w8Ikasct0Otztpa3369bQ4aL5NALA36BVuKiSBWsZwmv7rR64zv_PWlSckqFT30r64qw-ZfYIidTh5CZ16dw%3D%3D) | |
---
**Fundamentalist Liberals Are Making COVID Worse**

By Bobby Jindal
|
---
As increasingly secular liberals find more and more meaning in politics, they are becoming increasingly fundamentalist. Liberals are adopting the same rigid approach they decry in others, refusing to compromise, consider alternative viewpoints or even view their beliefs as falsifiable. Importing this religious fervor into policy debates renders liberals incapable of considering proportionality, cost-benefit analyses or appropriate trade-offs.

Liberals have recently transformed their environmental campaign into a moral crusade, and they are bringing this absolutist approach to fighting the COVID pandemic. Viewing climate change in apocalyptical terms has left them unwilling to consider lower-carbon transition fuels, like natural gas, or new technologies, like carbon capture. Their faith disavows any concession of offsetting costs like job losses in high-paying fossil fuel industries, higher energy bills and less reliable and convenient energy. Former secretary of state and current climate czar [John Kerry](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=e655b03e634b4125b3777500df51a28b&_e=c5ktM-mLo0SzAQaeLQLQSZjF24B21IaGAABeULMsq4VRYxKs-OqoLPICnk7FBjjBcTz5SiIFLLB7KvJBxnP4y4rKw6Al51KsHxi4iL9l3VnYHYnIihpRKKMWQGVZbXMpVOodakvXRBcySAqyim5QEoQvvR7pRvl0msQI52x-V8rmpesCINsEIr588BPI_GjZTReaqhC_e687nMjSu9jrS3cGDeCLh2NOROWsEWyGhvAsbR0cMNKjEmKW-FtncFN2uOBIXYS_i4UUJ4JHld-xrsFNET4uYNL3tAnewhRE3Gc%3D) [blithely suggests](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=e655b03e634b4125b3777500df51a28b&_e=c5ktM-mLo0SzAQaeLQLQSb6QOLYI0WfA-QPsACAPTL-ct4PQ1BRan_QvHkMWgZ67aFRA7Vrg8bMgT2C3gicZYLOM32Xz49DrYk9DNWALq4qMQje0WQgQAgr_uP7J7SKS4OHvlv2lQ5lCvL8DpFTaplFEwHKDPg-a4qGJH4vA2Z99vV7rKlkfAXpo1SyiSD3PUjmDRUrrTtTNpJW4_CZZ1xmjkDkedn5kA7LD_JN4x9UGwLvffItSVcrgFIeVvy8hbR1cklYb7AyO2Zz5gG-sTyL3tJ75AbKCNHb4UU3Mn1jWE7zRgL6H4uBMPW_-1RJyiDAVfhJMsAolGrBgcxK27w%3D%3D) oil, natural gas and coal workers become solar power or wind turbine technicians—ignoring the fact that these jobs will not offer the same pay, or even be located in the same communities. Renewable energy advocates must contend with the fact they will be creating fewer jobs than the ones lost, and that the new promised jobs are often temporary, [offer lower wages and benefits](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=e655b03e634b4125b3777500df51a28b&_e=c5ktM-mLo0SzAQaeLQLQSTQ9a8kH8KPl06iEIfK1ZPiGBIzoyB8OEvTpFoRIfogjCUBdddMYmmPdNeJl0CPzSKNlxPdCZ9DpGiInCrsBj5J5cGYTSu16B1DaJW_YydEG6Z-hqhyQahLCeBbsWtjifEh3bNZvj1rdJrJmTgUAs6GONLND-4u5yJcf6RLzfS8kq5GSXaeUlQZctdMIY8w-XS6i4ZyIfORAs2xcZPF506asYVXwpeUmjuLPdovtE7YZGhBhPFSP9_ZIl3QC4SUBFgjI4qCaseBB12e9IAcTS4yUXR_-6ZVq8oyylJZEX-GJraeSxQzvhIGMQOTjoG0BeA%3D%3D), and require different skills and geographic mobility.

It is tempting to promise win-win solutions, and the benefits may outweigh the costs for coastal urban elites far removed from states and communities heavily dependent on existing energy jobs and energy-intensive industries. It would be more honest to concede the costs associated with [overhauling the nation's entire economy](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=e655b03e634b4125b3777500df51a28b&_e=c5ktM-mLo0SzAQaeLQLQSbRbFtgEo6Ec44AHDXjg9_N-p9bgZt10-nwrcVWPnlNgSMtAY263OU7BK7JuQZl4wiY93Cfaoo-CSKRTxKKDaCap4nx9UHEMEwj-V9ULFUS8eg09c-vglmtJXVVGEr-TL7WeB153Xq2eFEDDT74tv9400_PRr3i7UKsboBkIig17C1DKxhh1DRyr73MArD4Krh6Yl6EeeGWB55LwKQ_HyKzVNCRJEGM7POVzNtEpz-xsso6GFD87vC_F7Q5kOUwNXp51OcxbEmOjtY1DHxUKQXdsrsixHen9BzJOZP-N1DoaMDC0MnvJ0QKLAqph_UzfLGzMJnv-283qiSzT-4buuwo%3D), starting with the transportation and power sectors, and only then make the case for the benefits. Such debate would allow for compromises like investing in mitigation when doing so is more practical, allowing sufficient time for realistic transitions based on available technology, compensating the inevitable losers from new regulations and requiring China and others to abide by the same standards...

_Read more_ **[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=e655b03e634b4125b3777500df51a28b&_e=c5ktM-mLo0SzAQaeLQLQSZjF24B21IaGAABeULMsq4UZc2SQYTl9jcUx0qUaR1zHMuaUhuIk7o6INZPsXPDEQvbrHpqaM190fKOdfwvR6ijYA0zzTNtNVcyK0QRoNMP-nJKgUY7I3jyOLmQlhBRLIwrJGuvUpqNViWwbXwvoRVOovig6d6HpFa9Tgqpa9zUzlC1H_PudpxL1hGkXY2X7w6pWUzXJ4_oPTY_63CmgGDpsNqNuwBkS30ug4ymW1W6IWZGCw2UqVdua1xsVhMqYFUzyc3-jIfHz0WBe3RMmhSWlIoZj9w2BMncy4bESZaR13c3q2eTDkJPUYy-OJX1vZC9h9Ta8ZPcUqrK4wVI4Fag%3D).**
|

name: Kevin Hern
subject: National Small Business Week
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/c412f6aa29b6bdb7/dcc5d1f90b2172aec3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, It’s National Small Business Week, and I am deeply proud of every Oklahoman involved in owning and operating a small business. There are over 340k small businesses alone in our great state, employing over 700k people! They are a vital part of our district and state, and I hope you will join me in saluting those who are helping to fuel our economy. **I know from experience exactly how tenacious, innovative, and driven a person has to be in order to open and run a small business. ** Sometimes people poke fun at me for owning a McDonalds franchise. They’ve even nicknamed me “McCongressman.” But the truth is that I spent 10 years flipping burgers in order to save up the money to purchase my first franchise in the restaurant system. I worked every part of the restaurant to learn all the ins and outs, and picked up any odd job on the side to save every penny I could. I’m so proud of what I was able to build with a dream and an unbeatable work ethic, and I’m proud of every American who has done the same. **I know the grit and determination it takes to be a small business owner, and I want to take a moment to recognize and honor all the hardworking Oklahomans who make up our small business community this week, and every single day. ** If you are involved in a small business and everything that entails, thank you from the bottom of my heart. Sincerely,
Kevin Hern | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/c412f6aa29b6bdb7/6bcfc2df70e1aa13c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/c412f6aa29b6bdb7/0f462b9ba7394fe8c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

Instead, the Biden administration appears willing to accept global Chinese dominance, provided the “rules” are maintained. Notably, Blinken did not rule out the possibility that China would overtake the United States as the world’s dominant power. Instead, the Biden administration appears willing to accept global Chinese dominance, provided the “rules” are maintained. | | Hi, Yesterday, we emailed you about Susie’s new Republican challenger. Well, we did a little more research and found something out that we wish wasn’t true. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Chip in today to help us stop any attempt at taking back this seat >>
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**_Breaking News:_ Our first Republican opponent has just announced they are running to defeat us in 2022
_Chip in before midnight to help hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate!_
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210504-1-15&t=1&refcode2=557_6688874_kD-AC3&akid=557%2E6688874%2EkD-AC3)**
* * *
Friends —
We just learned that a major National Republican and Trump donor is running against Mark. _This isn’t just bad news for Arizona, but for the entire country._
Right now, we need strong, independent leadership in the Senate to guide us through these challenging times — not someone who will put partisan priorities ahead of the needs of the American people.
**You can see how important it is that we keep Mark in the Senate, especially right now, which is why we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your donation to work in our efforts to hold this seat in 2022 and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210504-1-15&t=2&refcode2=557_6688874_kD-AC3&akid=557%2E6688874%2EkD-AC3)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210504-1-15&t=3&refcode2=557_6688874_kD-AC3&akid=557%2E6688874%2EkD-AC3) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210504-1-15&t=4&refcode2=557_6688874_kD-AC3&akid=557%2E6688874%2EkD-AC3)
