---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210504-1-15&t=7&refcode2=557_6688874_kD-AC3&akid=557%2E6688874%2EkD-AC3) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210504-1-15&t=8&refcode2=557_6688874_kD-AC3&akid=557%2E6688874%2EkD-AC3)
---|---
One of our biggest advantages is we know we’re running again in 2022 and we can start laying the groundwork for that victory today — but only if folks like you show your support for Mark.
It only takes $1 to get involved in a people-powered campaign like ours, and when you do, you immediately become part of a team of individuals all coming together for a common purpose: _to keep Mark Kelly in the Senate where he can continue to fight for us and our families._
**So click the link below and chip in $3 if you can to help us put a down payment on keeping Mark in the Senate. If we all do our part we can stop any attempt to take back this seat.**
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/Defend-This-Seat**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210504-1-15&t=9&refcode2=557_6688874_kD-AC3&akid=557%2E6688874%2EkD-AC3)
Thank you in advance for chipping in,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

subject: Democrats still want an apology? Not gonna happen.

body:
If you know anything about me, you know I’m not in the business of appeasing Democrats [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=80b198d008ff4be489f07a07e5fa1945&_e=qaf4yGTs1vzZ8IrAld71F_vCMsrTubnAA9lG7sL1hhqV2lBRiClj_fxJQxSHx2Nl-_jErHM4eh-v6eMHzBUMB-rQpDL-JtyoSbidsmBxWltL1dU-ThPfusyi8CDnRIGeJzVz2r_k6Ev4MUoxyC0ZO6NxGXKBOxUF7Clmmyqtf72NqtH5_ZYdX2Bg4tmKJVe3fV_9GPrsa9hk3UaJENSc0KwZ40N1QmDPNdz4WRWctgFF8UP6sNvsHYQUGP7iwdDUD2940xN4DNjXQHWoGtMaRdVFWlMiHOTOJ4x7OG5_Ovywi5zjLSebD_ZaAtFCWe0IvsJBHR35bYr-z2lfLyHiJQ9QJjc3Yb4LrgiIG1_3OImu9UqFUejeVCgdoizi3UuHgjXgzep0i-DWmIw68VtnWw%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Democrats are always pointing the finger at conservatives, hurling insults and allegations, and demanding an apology.

They’ve called for me to be censored, expelled, arrested, and much worse!

**If you know anything about me, you know I’m not in the business of appeasing Democrats, the mainstream media, Big Tech, or woke, mega-corporations.**

The media STILL wants me to apologize for standing with those exercising their constitutional right to peaceful protest on January 6th.

Denouncing those who participated in the criminal riot in DC was not enough for the left, even though democrat leaders played a pivotal role in stoking a whole summer’s worth of deadly violence all across America.

**The left attacks me because they hate my message of breaking up Big-Tech (the dems censorship arm), and trust-busting the mega-corporations (the dems funding arm). **

My message is simple — I will continue to take a stand for conservatism without apology.

I’ll never back down from taking a stand against those opposed to liberty and freedom, and it’s time we stopped trying to make democrats happy!
[_**STAND WITH JOSH HAWLEY**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=80b198d008ff4be489f07a07e5fa1945&_e=qaf4yGTs1vzZ8IrAld71F_vCMsrTubnAA9lG7sL1hhqV2lBRiClj_fxJQxSHx2NlIGmA-EgAUH-Ku9iGINzHHqIQ3jzV4leSzqGy4uKcjIwVe-5FwHsLuvMEHMrpvBc9kYfzwW67mRBHt2C6yapRH9O25HroaVG01s-DpVWwkVt4W4uB1tBvQdKWl6C86g0hC3-93xT6cS94kViQnk8fSvge4Yr0o5gNnTUC35QLtUMyyCf12bKvKaflfAjNvKuy5cZhA7NW0oF4t1G7Ak1_10qUAtNNtijoKXLjVfedOj9_gbRkzJxngIEENeXKQrsR9b3cEACWpuFOiwJ-pZ6QZRTguLiMkBVupwuJwn8I4i7pH1knL_CgCIub71dUZfa_tXuHuxDFQD2ZHjYZZp21CA%3D%3D)
In Liberty,
Josh

name: Erica Smith for U.S. Senate
subject: We *really* care about what you think.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Can you do us a favor and take a minute to share your thoughts with us by taking our official campaign survey?
#
Since kicking off our campaign in March, thousands of supporters have joined our moral movement to create a North Carolina that works for all of us.
Our team is so proud of the diverse, working-class coalition we’re building, and your support in this fight means *everything.*
**We want you to truly be a part of this movement. That’s why, today, we’re checking in with grassroots supporters like you to hear what’s on your mind.[Will you take our short strategy survey to share your input with Erica and our team? Your answers will help guide our campaign strategy in the weeks and months ahead.](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202105-survey/?source=em20210504-64&t=1&akid=64%2E3698%2EXtgpQp)**
**[Take the survey »](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202105-survey/?source=em20210504-64&t=2&akid=64%2E3698%2EXtgpQp)**
We’re always going to keep it 100% real with you; the truth is that this is going to be a tough race. We’re up against a crowded and competitive field of candidates — that means getting our bold, progressive message out will be even more challenging from here on out.
So, we need your help. [**Can you do us a favor and take a few minutes to share your thoughts with us by taking our Official Team Erica Strategy Survey?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202105-survey/?source=em20210504-64&t=3&akid=64%2E3698%2EXtgpQp) We’ve got some big decisions to make for our campaign, and we want to know where you’re at before we finalize our plan for the next phase of this race.
Thanks so much, and we can’t wait to read your feedback!
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210504-64-footer&t=4&refcode2=64_3698_XtgpQp&akid=64%2E3698%2EXtgpQp)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=5&akid=64%2E3698%2EXtgpQp)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=64%2E3698%2EXtgpQp)

body:
Help us fight the Communists! |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=8d7d1614ab&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots who are fearless in taking on the corrupt, big government Swamp, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=eca26bda4a&e=ba6e67b849)!

**If you saw Biden's disastrous speech last night, you know what's about to happen: a year and a half of the American People getting the short end from the Democrats, hoping the Republicans in the Senate hold firm and Joe Manchin keeps resisting. **

I think the NY Post summed it up perfectly:

_President Biden’s speech Wednesday night failed on all counts: It didn’t sell his latest spending plan, it didn’t sell his larger agenda — and, worst of all, it didn’t sell him._

_It seemed like he was just skipping whole paragraphs and even pages. You could see even Democrats wincing above their masks.

He tossed in a few blatant whoppers, like his repeated claims that economists “left, right and center” agree his program will work just as he says._

_Mixed in were lies about how he’d solved the border crisis as vice president, plus vague waves at a foreign policy (and trade: He talks “buy American” as much as the guy he replaced) and some noise about being tough militarily when the Defense Department is about the only federal agency he doesn’t want to spend more on.

The speech was packed with hoary clichés and empty rhetoric about unity, spiced with blather about “white supremacy” and “systemic racism” even as he was insisting (correctly) that nearly all cops only work hard to protect the public._

So there you have it: a mix of lies, delusions, and outrageous spending we can't afford and won't pass.

Oh, and calling us all racists. Sen. Scott was right to call out that nonsense.
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=b9272b5ec2&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| But then, that's what the Swamp is.... a bunch of greedy, unscrupulous people who don't care about us, look down on us, and want to destroy the country.

**My favorite part was when he described the January 6 protests as "the greatest threat to our democracy since the Civil War". I mean, really?**

Since the Civil War:

-4 presidents were assassinated while in office

-A Bernie Bro shot up several Republican Congressmen in 2017 at a baseball practice

-Pearl Harbor was attacked by the Japanese

-The Constitution was amended to allow for Federal income tax.

-Islamic terrorists attacked the Twin Towers and Pentagon on 9/11.

Sorry Senile Joe, but there is no universe where January 6- where Duck Dynasty and a guy in a buffalo bikini strolled through Congress- is worse than any of that.

RINO Liz Cheney has been peddling that lie a lot too- and the Never-Trumper Congresswoman literally threw people out of the way to run up and fist bump with her fellow leftist, Biden.

**We need to get rid of the leftists of BOTH parties, including Biden, Pelosi, and Cheney!**

[We fight the right fights for the country. We depend on you to help us put patriots in a place to succeed!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=2877b3dab5&e=ba6e67b849)

The Swamp is full of Communists and traitors! Don't let the Swamp beat good candidates. Let's make America strong again. We are always strongest when we FIGHT Communists, not when we elect them!

[Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=91f710fb1a&e=ba6e67b849)

Respectfully,

name: Hirsh Singh
subject: [Must READ] Unmask Our Children
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR GOVERNOR
body:
It’s time to take the masks off our children.

| [ |
--- ](https://gov.nj.hirshsingh.com/wta/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4688275&N=37324&L=20768&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGlyc2hzaW5naC5jb20=)
| [ ](https://gov.nj.hirshsingh.com/wta/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4688275&N=37324&L=20768&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGlyc2hzaW5naC5jb20=)
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | | | | Supporter, Did you see my op-ed in the _Daily Caller_ about unmasking our kids from yesterday? If not, I hope you’ll take a couple minutes to read it now. Thanks again for all you’ve done to support my pro-MAGA campaign for New Jersey Governor! \- Hirsh Singh **Unmask Our Children** It’s time to take the masks off our children. Millions of Americans have already been vaccinated, and vaccines are now available to anyone who wants one. The early days where we were still learning about this virus are over, and hospitals are in no danger of being overwhelmed. Forcing kids as young as three and four years old to wear masks was bad policy from the beginning. I’m running for Governor of New Jersey to end these ridiculous policies and empower those closest to students to make the best decisions for their specific situation. I’m not a doctor, but it doesn’t take a genius to figure out that making young children wear masks does more harm than good. For starters, we know that COVID-19 poses an extraordinarily low risk to children. Few children contract COVID-19, and the overwhelming majority of those that do recover quickly. Kids often don’t know how to wear masks properly, mitigating the potential benefits of mask-wearing. Kids also already touch their face more than adults, something that mask-wearing will only make worse. Moreover, children don’t fully understand how to keep their mask clean and when to replace it. Dirty masks can become a breeding ground for bacteria and other microbes, many of which can be more dangerous to children than COVID-19. Mask mandates in schools force children to wear these infested rags over their mouth and nose for seven hours every day. Wearing masks is also irreparably harming the emotional wellbeing of our children. I recently shared the testimony of Erin Pein, a school nurse who has seen first-hand how devastating mask-wearing can be to the mental health of our children. Her heartbreaking account relays how she witnessed children become physically ill from mask-induced anxiety. In one case, a young girl was so afraid to take off her mask that she kept it on even after she had vomited in it. When Erin Pein tried to voice her concerns about making kids wear masks, she was suspended and escorted out of her school, all for trying to take a stand for the health of our children. As she plainly says, “this mandate isn’t safe. It’s not good for kids, it’s not good for adults, it’s not good for anybody.” This is Phil Murphy’s New Jersey – if you speak out against harmful policies, you are silenced and have your livelihood threatened. Forcing young children to wear masks is nothing more than a performative act demanded by Gov. Murphy and his anti-science administration in Trenton. We should listen to the first-hand experience of everyday heroes like Erin and base our policies on real-world realities. On May 10, I will be holding a rally with Erin and other concerned parents and teachers in Stafford Township to raise awareness about this issue. Democrats would like this crisis to continue indefinitely, so that they can continue to interfere in the private lives of every New Jerseyan. It’s time to stand up and say “No” to this agenda, end the heavy-handed, top-down approach of Phil Murphy, and promote individual freedom once again, returning power to the people to make their own decisions. | | | | [DONATE!](https://gov.nj.hirshsingh.com/wta/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4688275&N=37324&L=24299&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zaW5naC1mb3ItZ292ZXJub3IvaHM0Z19kb25fYm1faGZfbmotZGNvZV9lbT9hbW91bnQ9NTA=)
---
|
---

|

|
---

On May 10, I will be holding a rally with Erin and other concerned parents and teachers in Stafford Township to raise awareness about this issue. Democrats would like this crisis to continue indefinitely, so that they can continue to interfere in the private lives of every New Jerseyan. It’s time to stand up and say “No” to this agenda, end the heavy-handed, top-down approach of Phil Murphy, and promote individual freedom once again, returning power to the people to make their own decisions. | | | | = | | | Please mail checks to: SINGH FOR GOVERNOR 1103 Shore Rd #409 Linwood, NJ 08221 (C)2021, All Rights Reserved PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR GOVERNOR ELIZABETH CURTIS, TREASURER | |

name: Patrick J. Murphy
subject: Leading with my friend, Tammy Duckworth, on May 18th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Peter,

Tammy Duckworth has been a role model, mentor, and friend of mine for a long time. And she has been a damn fine Senator from Illinois, too.

That's why we're proud to have her back at Taking the Hill as our first endorsee of 2020 - and we're celebrating it with Senator Duckworth at [_**a virtual rally on May 18th!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/IVYxo01fjyBHdcH5riHmfuVAQk1OJDezK3BJ-TFP1wY=/sxJMlQ7ohZW2iUaWObA511PNLGis-SnSWZBDgpogqNI=)

I'm asking you personally to help us make this event a big success by [_**getting your ticket today.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/IVYxo01fjyBHdcH5riHmfuVAQk1OJDezK3BJ-TFP1wY=/sxJMlQ7ohZW2iUaWObA511PNLGis-SnSWZBDgpogqNI=) And if you can help us [_**sponsor, host, or co-host the event,**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/IVYxo01fjyBHdcH5riHmfuVAQk1OJDezK3BJ-TFP1wY=/sxJMlQ7ohZW2iUaWObA511PNLGis-SnSWZBDgpogqNI=) we'll shout you out during the event and give you special access to future events with friends and guests like Raphael Warnock, Mark Kelly, and others.

From defending the rights of mothers and veterans to protecting our American ideals, Tammy has been a leader of integrity in the Senate. And as we work to secure a majority of integrity in Congress, we have no better ally than her. [_**Join us on May 18th to show Senator Duckworth that we have her back!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/IVYxo01fjyBHdcH5riHmfuVAQk1OJDezK3BJ-TFP1wY=/sxJMlQ7ohZW2iUaWObA511PNLGis-SnSWZBDgpogqNI=)

[**Date: Tuesday, May 18th
Time: 7:00 pm - 8:00 pm Eastern
Location: Zoom!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/IVYxo01fjyBHdcH5riHmfuVAQk1OJDezK3BJ-TFP1wY=/sxJMlQ7ohZW2iUaWObA511PNLGis-SnSWZBDgpogqNI=)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/IVYxo01fjyBHdcH5riHmfuVAQk1OJDezK3BJ-TFP1wY=/sxJMlQ7ohZW2iUaWObA511PNLGis-SnSWZBDgpogqNI=)

In solidarity,

The Hon. Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
Former Congressman (PA-01)

Biden is risking our nation's security

| | |

Peter,

Prior to Joe Biden's administration, when a convicted criminal alien was released from prison, ICE would send them back to their home country. Now, _convicted criminal aliens are no longer being deported, they 're being released back into our communities!_

As Biden dismantles the Trump border policies that worked, the situation at our southern border has devolved into a huge catastrophe with national consequences. [**GOP leaders like me are filing suit against Biden 's administration to protect our communities from their reckless policy, but we can't do it alone.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=455ecc4ffc624bcc88154e306839e5e7&_e=hBkwWnVx8n8YPvT0eJP35mpKPBONPe_vZHS470AIrWf_P0eMJEy9VMlOe05Q0XeSUWwgTJ_2atZzU8Z66qHelAXVGELQ1DfexIjezKUcjRt11_67UTmrH82-2qJx9Y-Zs6rIs1qYi6-p4zrq6sW7zbmbsTC1FqubFWBjL5RVDGXWk-qG9poKmn9a9ikyP_oSHiFvlq6BoUgbpkdu9ez3lbldPlfLaRcNvx1syLTUkc6KHc_b73zKmVBZcZseiZAxYxK398oe9IrrCyesVF4ReNNYEe8TfMbB1OF4ZTrBLkc-C0-0K53dNfrbUX9t2vPbayp45vU9oeRwsR9a8BOkP_zUqJMYW6gOqTWimx8PuHQ0obdTGouxDgGkqtUijvbFCoTWT_hyLfxleLPOBJxFO-sQ66EWk05yhsgOZKQoA9V9czg-eqaQpViZUYU6VL7Y5TS9XH7fOYo7GlX_TjY1zEQ_O9A8v-yWed4L2rry8MjbeJ_GkHuAIsqm4QuUEHX5T9yGsaazVvd9r92szuqcLg%3D%3D)

Biden cannot simply default on his responsibility to enforce the law under the Constitution. It's not only a dereliction of duty, it's a direct threat to the safety and security of our communities.

[**Biden has failed on illegal immigration and rule of law, and GOP governors are the last line of defense against Biden 's most dangerous policies. Please stand with us today. **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=455ecc4ffc624bcc88154e306839e5e7&_e=hBkwWnVx8n8YPvT0eJP35mpKPBONPe_vZHS470AIrWf_P0eMJEy9VMlOe05Q0XeSUWwgTJ_2atZzU8Z66qHelAXVGELQ1DfexIjezKUcjRt11_67UTmrH82-2qJx9Y-Zs6rIs1qYi6-p4zrq6sW7zbmbsTC1FqubFWBjL5RVDGXWk-qG9poKmn9a9ikyP_oSHiFvlq6BoUgbpkdu9ez3lbldPlfLaRcNvx1syLTUkc6KHc_b73zKmVBZcZseiZAxYxK398oe9IrrCyesVF4ReNNYEe8TfMbB1OF4ZTrBLkcJaelPs9huKiW8GWQjkQH3yRuWps3bpLq5fAmlui-K0lI40XT_9JmH8fT5wxjo6bVwQCdT5JsZpip8H7tHtQgqUH3oFIKdhfYSY848uzrPDdmpXzo_kb1n3L4qa1iSehivIzL-fNLcqiAqQyMWW-9XQ3Lmb6t_ftWL6GFUMSsCrEtdgIZfC0NGx2zJicg6GLu3rwknfcAXlqA5Ef6n6HvSOzFmQkXhV9CH3-SnMNJjcA%3D%3D) Thank you,

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: The most significant investment we can make in our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We can’t thank teachers enough for all their hard work and dedication, especially during this past year filled with challenges unlike any we’ve ever.. [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=cadccdbb041140d1bee4309d5c2c8785&_e=3K80ixCquZvghUJRL4fmCk3cjtUI85ftlOOs_xdgMf_CFSR0GzHXrP3Eh-H_slS8pzInn0FHZBO7ZlvL_GrA_zZQyytJ7QpeLKdWT5Hc-C-sdJyhCUmG5Y4B9kBLzhk-v7vWG0tShnxdB1lMccA1xlTS2IHvwvMYwwCfT0q7NX8ekWNJePGcISXHk-ZAPUjBaLEzef714NiMs-f1eP-VhQRc2gUp3pZ_zxy1D8_CcMmcx-2vmkcGZHE4ezC_Nwfnu4aqWoqr4fyB36sseP76IemZUwyiZ74-CM9evt5XzN6ZiKzdrAaMTm6CMDHd3vXruBG9RcODgNIvS3YbBOhQ_GagDemPPOftN1eb49xVf3x46tT-e7ZzTD0JuOWpeoHGOPu600a-c0yf1zkVEGogiDkVu8baIK_cDMJWjoxe-seJdzjBR1oRL7Sn7ezasgMop_xjXo-E40JmyA7a9yXXgd1-Al__g6g8NIl4xO_eSy0%3D) | |
---
|
---
Friend,

It’s Teacher Appreciation Week –– a chance for us to recognize and celebrate the thousands of Hoosier educators who do so much for our students and our communities!

We can’t thank teachers enough for all their hard work and dedication, especially during this past year filled with challenges unlike any we’ve ever faced.

But education is more than just essential.

**It’s the MOST significant investment we can make in our future, and that’s why Governor Holcomb is investing in education at a record high level in Indiana’s new budget.**
[](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=cadccdbb041140d1bee4309d5c2c8785&_e=3K80ixCquZvghUJRL4fmCk3cjtUI85ftlOOs_xdgMf_CFSR0GzHXrP3Eh-H_slS8pzInn0FHZBO7ZlvL_GrA_zZQyytJ7QpeLKdWT5Hc-C-sdJyhCUmG5Y4B9kBLzhk-v7vWG0tShnxdB1lMccA1xlTS2IHvwvMYwwCfT0q7NX8ekWNJePGcISXHk-ZAPUjBaLEzef714NiMs-f1eP-VhQRc2gUp3pZ_zxy1D8_CcMmcx-2vmkcGZHE4ezC_Nwfnu4aqWoqr4fyB36sseP76IcMqsDfSZxNCCkDxvr55foPvvKkfKLsQLeNaQuQrli7uFJZV7roNuwXzbLcKdonlwMRw6G9z7j-M-yOqas51tS-WdEfen0_PMYol6-X0pjyP81MEsFqdb9vYKG1Udj_NNuhKsR0wvD90kfOw3iMS3HlMZ8azMzy2pB3Ui0zyCFFmTgJ0G6mFD6gaEq17iWJovSA7mGkWIo0bqhjs80dmGq8%3D)
When it comes to education in the 2021 legislative session Governor Holcomb:
* Added $1.9 billion in NEW money to K-12 education
* Fully funded K-12 public schools
* Expanded the nation’s best school choice program, covering 48,000 Hoosier students
* Increased K-12 tuition support by $1.03 billion
* Required schools to direct 45% of tuition support to teacher pay
* Recommended all new teacher salaries start at $40,000

In the words of Governor Holcomb, these historic pay raises for teachers and K-12 funding boosts for schools are “game changers.”

The positive impacts from these investments will be felt _**decades**_ down the road in the form of a more skilled workforce, a stronger economy, and a brighter future for all Hoosiers.

**[Friend, before you go, will you join us in celebrating Teacher Appreciation Week by adding your name to thank Hoosier teachers for all they do for our students?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=cadccdbb041140d1bee4309d5c2c8785&_e=3K80ixCquZvghUJRL4fmCk3cjtUI85ftlOOs_xdgMf_CFSR0GzHXrP3Eh-H_slS8pzInn0FHZBO7ZlvL_GrA_zZQyytJ7QpeLKdWT5Hc-C-sdJyhCUmG5Y4B9kBLzhk-v7vWG0tShnxdB1lMccA1xlTS2IHvwvMYwwCfT0q7NX8ekWNJePGcISXHk-ZAPUjBaLEzef714NiMs-f1eP-VhQRc2gUp3pZ_zxy1D8_CcMmcx-2vmkcGZHE4ezC_Nwfnu4aqWoqr4fyB36sseP76IcwZTue12PNEbHLjFkozu9UAX2ozc7lBlwgsQtcXSGzi307buKYDO2wr8h-EExR4vfmXrhRF-yUzpU8z00HSKHmvC6skxdkfnL7fXiQE-4-aJbwFv4cEcvhdB48omXXW-Ni7-Ou97N0FS-hApctx3K8m1sh8DkMFNgArB9Ej3qQwfAFfUXA1-dJaA5TO_4vxCGbYeRTOMl2hYE13GGb9e4w%3D)**
